title: Operation
description: Represents an asynchronous operation such as a segment export

errorDetails.description: Error details if the operation failed

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the operation was created

finishedAt.description: Timestamp when the operation finished. Null while running.

estimatePctComplete.description: Estimated percentage of completion for the operation

results.description: Results of the operation when completed, including download URLs

downloadUrl.description: URL for downloading the exported data
